topStories.title: ICE nabs slain Iranian Gen Soleimani's niece who called US ‘Great Satan,' as State Dept ends legal status: ‘Not allow…’
topStories.description: Qasem Soleimani, who led the IRGC, was killed in a drone strike ordered by President Trump near the Baghdad International Airport in Iraq in 2020

topStories.title: Plea in Supreme Court challenges transgender law amendments as breach of right to self-determined gender identity
topStories.description: Activists Laxminarayan Tripathi and Zainab Javid Patel challenge the validity of the Act for disregarding transgender identity as an ‘authentic human identity, freely chosen’

topStories.title: Qasem Soleimani Was Assassinated In 2020. Amid Iran War, US To Boot His Niece
topStories.description: Earlier in the month, Rubio also revoked the legal status of Fatemeh Ardeshir-Larijani, the daughter of  Ali Larijani.

topStories.title: Iran says US, Israel belong in Stone Age after Tehran university strike
topStories.description: Iranian minister said the US and Israel are the ones that belong in the Stone Age after an attack on Tehran university.

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by Charlie Chaplin: ‘You’ll never find a rainbow if…'
topStories.description: Charlie Chaplin's timeless words — 'You'll never find a rainbow if you're looking down' — remind us that hope is a direction, not just a feeling. Look up, and life's beauty reveals itself.

topStories.title: ‘Authority carries accountability’: Supreme Court restores bank manager’s dismissal
topStories.description: The top court noted allegations that the senior manager had connived with an officer and a gunman to misappropriate the money of customers for personal gain and steal bank records.

topStories.title: Central govt must not treat states as subordinates: SC Justice Nagarathna
topStories.description: Supreme Court Justice BV Nagarathna said the central government should treat states as equals, promoting cooperative federalism over hierarchical governance.

dailyNews.title: MVA rift: Uddhav likely to back Sunetra Pawar in Baramati bypoll, but Congress not on board
dailyNews.description: Ms. Pawar called Mr. Thackeray to seek his support in the seat her late husband left vacant, in line with State tradition; State Congress chief insists the party will field a candidate in Baramati

dailyNews.title: ‘Your sons more in danger with Trump’: Iran embassies tell US mother searching for missing pilot son
dailyNews.description: The Iranian embassies told the American woman that her pilot son would be safer in Iranian custody and suggesting he was more at risk under Donald Trump’s care.

dailyNews.title: Iran Signals Openness to Regional Diplomacy, Warns Of Broader Response Amid Escalating War
dailyNews.description: Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf pitches regional security without US-Israel role; FM Abbas Araghchi seeks "conclusive" end to what Tehran calls an imposed war

dailyNews.title: US arrests relatives of deceased Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
dailyNews.description: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

dailyNews.title: US Woman In Labour Forced To Attend Zoom Court Hearing For Refusing C-Section
dailyNews.description: During labour, Cherise Doyley of Florida was made to join a Zoom court hearing to discuss an emergency C-section procedure.

dailyNews.title: US Rescues One Crew Member From F-15 Jet Downed in Iran
dailyNews.description: Iran downed a US F-15E fighter jet and the US has rescued one of the two-person crew, according to a US official.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls out NYT for misstating NATO as North American Treaty Organisation, says 'very interesting mistake'
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump criticised the New York Times for mistakenly calling NATO the North American Treaty Organization, citing it as a significant error. He claimed the newspaper's credibility has declined due to ‘fake news’, leading to reduced circulation.

dailyNews.title: Plea in Supreme Court challenges 2026 Transgender Rights Amendment, says it causes ‘irreparable constitutional injury’
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court petition challenges 2026 Transgender Rights Amendment passed by Parliament

dailyNews.title: Over 30 universities hit by US-Israeli strikes since February 28, says Iranian Science Minister
dailyNews.description: Iranian media reported that American and Israeli aircraft targeted various strategic and civilian sites in Tehran on Friday afternoon, including the Shahid Beheshti University

dailyNews.title: ‘Do not intend to seek permission’: Russia sends strong message on oil sales, calls it ‘matter of national sovereignty’
dailyNews.description: Oil rallied Thursday after Trump vowed an escalation in the conflict against Iran over the coming weeks – which could disrupt energy flows through the vital Strait of Hormuz

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Bo Bennett on making mistakes: ‘Our mistakes don’t define us, it is how we…'
dailyNews.description: The quote tells us to not get bowed down by the mistakes we make – doesn't matter where – because that's not what defines us. What defines us is how we learn from those mistakes.

dailyNews.title: Attacks on nuclear facilities ‘will end life’ in gulf cities not Tehran: Iran’s FM after US-Israel strikes on Bushehr
dailyNews.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi warned that further strikes on the Bushehr nuclear power plant could lead to radioactive fallout affecting GCC capitals. He slammed Western silence over the attacks, which he claims have occurred multiple times.

dailyNews.title: Congress leader Ibobi urges Centre to delay Manipur census till normalcy is restored
dailyNews.description: Ibobi Singh urges Centre to defer Census in Manipur, citing displacement, data accuracy concerns and ongoing law and order challenges.

dailyNews.title: Projectile hits near Iran’s Bushehr nuclear plant, killing one: IAEA
dailyNews.description: Tehran says it is the fourth attack near the nuclear plant amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

topStories.description: President Trump bet that American firepower could cow Iran into compliance. So far, Iran’s leaders have been unwilling to quit.

topStories.description: The name atop the Justice Department’s organizational chart matters less than the presence of a president whose demands for revenge have become so extreme that even his most obsequious appointees have fallen short.

topStories.description: With the midterms approaching, the president may be running out of time to get new cabinet members confirmed without bipartisan support.

dailyNews.description: The law Republicans passed last year has so far been largely imperceptible to most Americans. That’s changing as tens of millions file their taxes this spring.

dailyNews.title: Epstein Presented Himself to Indian Tycoon as a Trump White House Insider
dailyNews.description: The convicted sex offender gave Anil Ambani information on appointments and foreign policy. Some seemed prescient, though there was no evidence he was close to the administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump Wants to Make Deportation Deals. Autocrats Are Ready to Listen.
dailyNews.description: The White House has turned deportations, a signature domestic issue, into a major piece of foreign policy. Here’s what we know about the program.

dailyNews.title: Foreign Doctors Forced Out of U.S. Hospitals by Trump Immigration Policy
dailyNews.description: Physicians from 39 countries are being pushed out of U.S. hospitals as a policy blocks their ability to work.

dailyNews.title: Pam and Kristi, Kicked to the Curb
dailyNews.description: Trump girls gone wild — or just gone.

dailyNews.title: Trump Needs Smarter Sycophants
dailyNews.description: Loyal losers don’t go very far with this president.

dailyNews.title: Arrest of Wisconsin Mosque Leader Was Tied to Trump Antisemitism Campaign
dailyNews.description: Immigration lawyers and former federal officials say the case of Salah Sarsour echoes those against other pro-Palestinian activists.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns "time is running out" on Iran to reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Meanwhile, a search-and-rescue mission for a downed fighter jet crew member is ongoing as the war in the Middle East rages on.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran of deadline to reopen Strait of Hormuz: "Time is running out"
dailyNews.description: The war shows no signs of slowing as Iran responds to airstrikes with attacks across the region.

dailyNews.title: Judge halts Trump effort requiring colleges show they don't consider race
dailyNews.description: The ruling follows a lawsuit filed earlier this month by a coalition of 17 Democratic state attorneys general.

dailyNews.title: Did Trump help write the latest White House East Wing court filing?
dailyNews.description: The government's legal bid to continue East Wing construction has the hallmarks of President Trump's social media posts.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran '48 hours before all Hell will reign down,' while search for missing crew member intensifies
dailyNews.description: The U.S. military continued to search for a missing American airman on Saturday after an F-15E fighter jet was shot down over southwestern Iran.
